name: Angoor Ka Sherbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the grapes and crush them thoroughly.
2. Pour the crushed grapes into a bowl and add enough water to cover them.
3. Mix well with your hands or a spoon until all the grapes are submerged in the liquid.
4. Strain the mixture through a sieve lined with cheesecloth or a fine-mesh strainer, discarding any skins or seeds that remain in the strainer.
5. Add ground pepper, roasted cumin seeds, and salt to the strained grape juice. Mix well until fully incorporated.
6. Stir in lemon juice and mix gently.
7. Transfer the sherbet mixture into a pitcher and add chilled water, stirring to combine.
8. Taste and adjust the sweetness by adding more sugar if desired.
9. Refrigerate the sherbet for at least 2 hours or overnight before serving.
10. Serve garnished with fresh mint leaves in glasses.
This recipe makes approximately 6 large glasses of sherbet.
